reason: Enabling FIPS mode on an existing RHEL 9 system requires modifying the kernel boot parameters and dracut configuration, which is not supported after installation and can render the system unbootable or lock out access. The policy designates such FIPS/bootloader changes as too dangerous to remediate automatically.
estimated_impact: reboot required; FIPS mode activation; Kernel boot parameter change; Potential system lockout; Bootloader configuration impact
